result.result:
## Shipped this week on agent-office (Apr 13–18)

Went from empty repo to a running v0 in one week. Four phases landed plus a memory/brief pivot at the end.

**Foundation (Apr 13)** — `bd59458` Phase 1, `6a1ede2` Phase 2 (personas/skills/resolver/launcher), `ca066d7` Phase 3 (memory engine with domain-scoped queries + importer), `eaebe7c` Phase 4 Office UI (React + animated scene).

**Pixel-art office engine (Apr 14)** — extracted from `pixel-agents` into reusable modules in a burst: `a88a3c6` → `fd62f21` (constants, sprites, floors/walls, layout, engine core, browser asset loader). Wired into a 3-column dashboard (`68467b0`) with `OfficeCanvas` (`c8c8f57`, `6ac04c0`). Merged as Phase 4.5/4.6 in `6b61356`. Launcher now spawns Claude Code in iTerm2 (`64ed75e`) and injects claude-mem context (`1c875a4`, `d109f26`, `e079b4f`). LaunchPreview UI added (`27cb1d3`, `c0f0d86`, `91ae92e`).

**Phase 5 telemetry (Apr 15)** — `2534692` + merge `3199451`, plus provider adapters and portfolio stats in `4d9806d`, launch picker redesign `42aab52`, skills inventory `a4cb528`.

**Provider-neutral history + stability (Apr 16)** — `9c4afb4` provider-neutral history ingestion, `3b9f1a9` doctor command, plus fixes for live session presence (`a8f6bd4`, `aaa47ed`), codex summaries (`fc03de3`, `1b6fbb5` on 18th), port resolution (`ef1cec2`).

**Unified memory + brief (Apr 18)** — the pivot: `4d9a58a` persona-scoped memory brief generator, `17bf243` wires it into live launch, `ec56fb9` renders it in LaunchPreview, `2dbef00` unified memory stats + semantic search (dropped claude-mem fallback), `3c1cf94` exposes them in the project picker, `3b6c0b4` consolidates LaunchWizard into a single 4-step modal. Bench harness `40c5014`, Playwright LinkedIn carousel capture `01f2a70`, README rewrite `18e1cbb`, office simplified to Boss/Workspace/Dungeon + Fixer `d5da889`.

**Uncommitted** — `bench/` directory and three scripts (`bench-aggregate.mjs`, `bench-judge.mjs`, `bench-whitepaper.mjs`) are still untracked per git status. Memory S294/3830 flagged this as the next concrete step — not resolved yet as far as I can see.

**Caveats** — I'm reading commit subjects, not diffs, so claims at that level of granularity are trustworthy; anything about how well features *work* I can't verify from here. The memory context loaded at session start is almost entirely from a different project (lens), so I ignored it for this summary.
